# ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.none

**Case**

There is no rating information for the media item lyrics.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Media Item Lyric Content Ratings

- **ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.explicit**: The media item lyrics contain explicit language.
- **ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.clean**: The media item lyrics don’t contain explicit language.

items.description: The media item lyrics contain explicit language.
items.name: ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.explicit

items.description: The media item lyrics don’t contain explicit language.
items.name: ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.clean

title: ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.none
